diagrams.title: Apache vs Nginx Architecture
diagrams.description: Comparison of request handling models in Apache (process/thread-based) vs Nginx (event-driven)
elements: Apache: Client → httpd process → thread → handler
Nginx: Client → master process → worker processes → event loop → handler
Nginx uses single thread with event loop handling multiple connections
diagrams.purpose: Understanding performance differences and when to use each server

diagrams.title: LAMP Stack Architecture
diagrams.description: Layered architecture of LAMP web stack showing component interaction
elements: Data flow: Browser → Apache → PHP → MySQL → PHP → Apache → Browser
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how web application components work together

diagrams.title: Request-Response Flow
diagrams.description: Step-by-step flow of HTTP request processing in web servers
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the complete lifecycle of web request handling

diagrams.title: Virtual Hosting Diagram
diagrams.description: Single server hosting multiple websites using virtual hosting
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how multiple websites are hosted on one server

diagrams.title: Reverse Proxy Architecture
diagrams.description: Nginx/Apache as reverse proxy handling client requests and forwarding to backend servers
elements: Benefits: Load balancing, Caching, Security, SSL termination
diagrams.purpose: Understanding proxy concepts and server deployment patterns

visuals.title: An Open Server Version 1
visuals.description: Visual diagram for an open server version 1
